title: Bee Removal in Travis, Staten Island | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional bee removal services in Travis, Staten Island. Safe, effective hive removal for homes and businesses. Licensed experts. Call now for $350-$550 service!
intro: Travis, Staten Island residents know that the neighborhood's quiet residential streets and proximity to the William T. Davis Wildlife Refuge can attract unwanted bee colonies to homes and properties. Best Pest Control NYC provides expert bee removal services throughout Travis, safely relocating hives from properties near Victory Boulevard and the surrounding areas. Our licensed technicians protect your family while preserving these important pollinators whenever possible.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC has served Staten Island communities like Travis for years with fast, humane bee removal solutions. Our team understands the unique challenges of Travis homes, from single-family residences to properties near wetland areas, and we guarantee safe, effective removal at competitive prices.
localContext: Travis features a mix of residential homes, many with spacious yards and wooded areas that can attract bee colonies seeking nesting sites. Properties near the wildlife refuge and Travis Avenue often experience bee activity due to the abundance of natural vegetation and flowering plants in this green Staten Island neighborhood.

faqs.question: How much does bee removal cost in Travis, Staten Island?
faqs.answer: Our bee removal services in Travis range from $350 to $550 depending on the size and location of the hive, accessibility, and whether it's a honeybee colony requiring relocation or another bee species. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing before beginning any work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a bee hive in Travis?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day bee removal services throughout Travis and Staten Island. Once you contact us, we can typically have a technician at your property within 24 hours to assess and remove the hive safely. Emergency services are available for severe infestations.

faqs.question: Do you relocate bees or exterminate them?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible, we humanely relocate honeybee colonies to work with local beekeepers, as bees are vital pollinators. For aggressive species like carpenter bees or yellow jackets that pose immediate danger, we use safe extermination methods. Our technicians assess each situation to determine the best approach for your Travis property.

faqs.question: Are bee removal services safe for my family and pets in Travis?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our licensed technicians use safe, proven methods and protective equipment to remove bee colonies without putting your family or pets at risk. We take extra precautions in residential areas of Travis and provide clear instructions to keep everyone safe during the removal process.
